title: bee villagers
description: Did you ever think minecraft didn't have enough bees?
body:
( reupload of my old pack from Curseforge )

Did you ever think Minecraft doesn't have enough bees.

Well, i've fixed it!


Introducing billagers!

The pack that fixes Minecraft

we got all the mobs

billagers

pibillagers

bavagers

biron golems

bandering braders

bindicators

bevokers

we also have b- we have witches

 

 

( inspiration from We don't bite, check out the pack it's pretty nifty. Requires EMF and ETF to run on fabric, or y'know, use optifine, I guess?)
